title: conyza flabellata
intro: Conyza flabellata, also known as fern leaf fleabane or Conyza flabellata, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the daisy family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant is said to provide health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and soothing skin irritations. Conyza flabellata can be prepared into herbal remedies through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which are believed to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
